title: Rei X Asuka and other unlikely pairings
display_title: Rei X Asuka and other unlikely pairings
wikitext:
[]: Rei X Asuka [and other unlikely] pairing[s].             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Mon Mar 08, 2010 6:37 pm Because why should the K/S fangirls have all the fun? To be honest, I could see those two hitting it off. Unlikely of course, but possible.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Mar 08, 2010 6:52 pm OTP , from aesthetic perspective

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Mon Mar 08, 2010 6:59 pm K/S is justified by canon. A/R only works if you're looking real hard for sexual tension between the two. Good luck.

[]:             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Mon Mar 08, 2010 7:04 pm Uriel Septim VII wrote: K/S is justified by canon. A/R only works if you're looking real hard for sexual tension between the two. Good luck.

[]: Re: Rei X Asuka pairing.             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Mar 08, 2010 7:31 pm Grimmjow wrote: To be honest, I could see those two hitting it off. Unlikely of course, but possible.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Mar 08, 2010 7:44 pm So, is the Fav Couple thread now obsolete?

[]:             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Mon Mar 08, 2010 8:02 pm It's not my fav couple hence it gets a thread of its own.

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Mon Mar 08, 2010 8:06 pm This thread is going to be a debate on the validity of fanfiction.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Mar 08, 2010 8:10 pm Sachi wrote: So, is the Fav Couple thread now obsolete?

[]:             Quote Post by konfunoodle » Tue Mar 09, 2010 2:01 am Who cares if this shipping is mostly fanfic. I like where this is going! Bump for this epic thread :]

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Tue Mar 09, 2010 2:12 am This is "opposites attract" taken to a whole nother level.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Mar 09, 2010 2:37 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: there is the "Shinji X Asuka" thread and it hasn't been locked

[]: Re: Rei X Asuka pairing.             Quote Post by DIDDY » Tue Mar 09, 2010 3:31 am Grimmjow wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by IDontWantNoScrub » Tue Mar 09, 2010 4:43 am My pervy manbrain approves. Plus, they do look cute together.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Tue Mar 09, 2010 7:06 am Mr. Tines wrote: Some fics manage to pull the pairing off without going too far OOC -- as in Rei providing some more practical how-to advice about not closing yourself off to others than she does in the elevator scene in episode 22 (Evil Eric's The Visitor ); or the two establishing some twisted co-dependency (Landgren's No Words ) -- but they have to force the set-up.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Tue Mar 09, 2010 8:07 am

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Tue Mar 09, 2010 11:00 am all i can say is this thread makes me want to be a hypocrite. damn my principals getting in the way of my fun!

[]:             Quote Post by Halicat » Tue Mar 09, 2010 11:20 am supershinjiasukashipper wrote: all i can say is this thread makes me want to be a hypocrite. damn my principals getting in the way of my fun!

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Tue Mar 09, 2010 11:29 am i would love to Halicat, but i belive feverantly in my principals, too feverantly almost, and it would kill me to be a hypocrite, but thanks for the thought.

[]:             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Tue Mar 09, 2010 11:31 am But let's admit it, if Kaworu was a girl instead of a guy, the whole K/S pairing would have far less fangirls. It's the yaoi factor that makes it so popular. RitsukoxMaya would be okay, but I hate Ritsuko so I refuse to waste my time on pairings involving her. MOAR
summary:
[]: Rei X Asuka [and other unlikely] pairing[s].             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Mon Mar 08, 2010 6:37 pm Because why should the K/S fangirls have all the fun? To be honest, I could see those two hitting it off. Unlikely of course, but possible.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Mar 08, 2010 6:52 pm OTP , from aesthetic perspective
